name: Redis Core Process Crash
description: The primary Redis database engine process crashed unexpectedly due to a system level signal (e.g. SIGSEGV).
remediation: Identify the crashing module (like redisearch.so). Check configuration parameters or plan a database stack upgrade.

name: Redis Sentinel Failover Active
description: Redis Sentinel HA controller detected master offline and actively negotiated replica promotion.
remediation: Check the health of the previous master container. Verify cluster network connectivity.

name: HTTP 5xx Server Error Spike
description: Clients encountered HTTP 500/502/503 responses, indicating the gateway failed to establish connection with upstream services.
remediation: Verify ingress proxy settings, network routes, and upstream application pod load statistics.

name: Java Null Pointer Exception
description: The application code attempted to access an uninitialized object pointer.
remediation: Inspect the code stack trace, verify parameter mapping validations, and update application code handles.

name: JVM/Process Out Of Memory (OOM)
description: The application ran out of heap space or exceeded Kubernetes memory boundaries.
remediation: Increase JVM memory pool settings (-Xmx) or scale up the container container memory limits in the yaml spec.

name: Python Traceback Exception
description: A Python process terminated due to an unhandled runtime exception.
remediation: Examine code stack frames, parameter validity, or missing libraries.
